title: Dataset for: Recurrent Neural Networks for Short-Term Water Demand Forecasting: A Technical Review and Framework for Implementation (2026)
author: Mandusic, Milna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Structured dataset containing the systematic extraction and classification of 42 peer-reviewed studies on short-term water demand forecasting using recurrent neural networks (standard RNN, LSTM, GRU), including model characteristics, model architecture, preprocessing methods, feature selection, feature engineering, signal decomposition, feature extraction, variables, optimization strategies, tusen hyperparameters, performance indicators, and benchmarking information.
steps_raw: Structured dataset containing the systematic extraction and classification of 42 peer-reviewed studies on short-term water demand forecasting using recurrent neural networks (standard RNN, LSTM, GRU), including model characteristics, model architecture, preprocessing methods, feature selection, feature engineering, signal decomposition, feature extraction, variables, optimization strategies, tusen hyperparameters, performance indicators, and benchmarking information.
